app.title: Skill Studio — Preferences
app.browserCallout: Some preferences require the Skill Studio desktop app.
app.downloadLink: Download for Mac, Windows, or Linux

theme.label: Appearance
theme.help: Match the system or pick a fixed theme.

launchAtLogin.label: Launch Skill Studio at login
launchAtLogin.help: Open Skill Studio automatically when you sign in.
launchAtLogin.errorAdmin: Couldn't change launch at login. Your administrator may have disabled this.

defaultProject.label: Default project folder
defaultProject.help: New projects start here unless you choose another location.

language.label: Language
language.help: Currently English only. More languages will arrive in a future release.

updates.heading: Updates
updates.subheading: Stay current with the latest Skill Studio.

channel.label: Update channel
channel.betaUnavailable: No beta release yet — we'll check back later.
channel.help: Stable releases are recommended. Beta delivers previews of upcoming features.

autoCheck.label: Check for updates automatically
autoCheck.help: Skill Studio will check daily and notify you when an update is ready.

updates.upToDate: Skill Studio is up to date.

errors.network: Couldn't reach the update server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.signature: Update signature invalid — refusing to install.
errors.diskSpace: Not enough disk space to install the update.

updates.browserCallout: Updates are managed by the desktop app. Run npm i -g vskill@latest to update the CLI.

privacy.heading: Privacy
privacy.subheading: Decide what Skill Studio shares with us.

telemetry.label: Send anonymous usage telemetry
telemetry.help: Helps us improve Skill Studio. Disabled by default. No personal data is collected.

crash.label: Send anonymized crash reports
crash.help: Sends a small report when Skill Studio crashes so we can fix it.

openLogs.label: Open logs folder
openLogs.help: Inspect log files to audit what Skill Studio records on your machine.
openLogs.browserHidden: Logs are stored on the desktop app only.

privacy.disclosure: Skill Studio v1 does not currently emit telemetry. These switches reserve your preference for when telemetry ships.

logLevel.label: Log level
logLevel.help: Higher levels emit more diagnostic detail. Defaults to Info.

settingsPath.label: Settings file
settingsPath.help: Where your preferences live on disk.
settingsPath.browserValue: Stored in this browser's local storage

factoryReset.label: Factory reset
factoryReset.help: Reset all preferences to their defaults. Recent projects and your keychain are preserved.
factoryReset.confirmBody: This will return every Skill Studio preference to its default value. Recent projects and API keys stored in your system keychain are not affected.
